mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER ( MEMBER_ID, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, NAME, BIRTHDAY, GENDER, ADDRESS, STATUS, QUIZ_ATTEMPT_COUNT, QUIZ_CORRECT_COUNT, CREATED_AT, UPDATE_AT, STATUS_MESSAGE ) VALUES ( MEMBER_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{loginId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{birthday}, #{gender}, #{address}, NVL(#{status},'ACTIVE'), 0, 0, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{statusMessage} )
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_ID, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, NAME, BIRTHDAY, GENDER, ADDRESS, STATUS, QUIZ_ATTEMPT_COUNT, QUIZ_CORRECT_COUNT, CREATED_AT, UPDATE_AT, STATUS_MESSAGE, PROFILE_IMAGE_URL FROM MEMBER WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE MEMBER
PASSWORD = #{password},
NAME = #{name},
BIRTHDAY = #{birthday},
GENDER = #{gender},
ADDRESS = #{address},
STATUS_MESSAGE = #{statusMessage},
UPDATE_AT = SYSDATE
WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT ITEM_ID FROM USER_ITEMS WHERE USER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_EQUIPPED = 'Y'
SELECT WALLET_ID, NOW_POINT, TOTAL_EARNED_POINT, TOTAL_SPENT_POINT FROM POINT_WALLET WHERE MEMBER_ID=#{memberId}

SELECT M.MEMBER_ID, M.LOGIN_ID, M.NAME, M.QUIZ_CORRECT_COUNT, M.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_COUNT, M.BIRTHDAY, M.GENDER, M.ADDRESS, TO_CHAR(M.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATED_AT, TO_CHAR(M.UPDATE_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS UPDATE_AT, M.IS_ONLINE, M.STATUS_MESSAGE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ECO_SHOP_REVIEW R WHERE R.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID) AS REVIEW_COUNT FROM MEMBER M WHERE M.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
